title: Component Library v2 Launch
description: Released version 2 of the internal component library with 20 new components, dark mode support, and comprehensive Storybook documentation.

title: Legacy API Migration Complete
description: Completed migration of 15 legacy REST endpoints to the new GraphQL API, enabling deprecation of the previous API version.

title: Advanced Search Feature
description: Implemented full-text search with faceted filtering, autocomplete suggestions, and saved search functionality using Elasticsearch.

title: Achieved 90% Code Coverage
description: Led a team-wide initiative to increase frontend test coverage from 45% to 90% over 3 months through unit, integration, and E2E testing.

title: Frontend Monitoring Setup
description: Set up comprehensive frontend monitoring with Sentry for error tracking and custom RUM metrics for performance monitoring.

title: Tech Debt Reduction Sprint
description: Organized and executed a 2-week tech debt sprint, refactoring 30+ files, removing 5k lines of dead code, and upgrading 12 core dependencies.
